title: phaseolus reflexopilosus
intro: Phaseolus reflexopilosus, also known as the Mexican bush bean, is a type of legume native to the Americas, characterized by its compact growth habit and edible beans. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Phaseolus reflexopilosus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea infusions and dried bean extracts, which can be used to alleviate various health issues and promote overall well-being.
